title: calathea utilis
intro: Calathea utilis, also known as the 'Dwarf Calathea' or 'Peacock Plant', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Marantaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Calathea utilis plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
